rationale: Codebase-pin lens: every claim ties to real, passing code at b27e793b. go build ./... exit 0; go vet ./cmd/mindspec/... ./internal/complete/... exit 0. All five named tests exist and PASS: TestPanelAdvisory_GateAwareCompare (9 subtests), TestConfigShow_GatesSubstitutesAndModelAdvisory, TestConfigShowGate_ResolvedJSON, TestConfigShow_HostileStringsEscaped, TestConfigShow_ReviewerCountNoteGateAware. Every resolver the code calls exists with the used signature: KnownModels (config.go:183), PanelGateExpectedReviewers (:750), PanelGateApproveThresholdExpr (:766), PanelGateAdvisoryDefault (:832), PanelGateKeys var enum (:101), escapeConfigValue (cmd/mindspec/config.go:114). Nil-guard confirmed at complete.go:389 (panelReg != nil) before the .Panel.Gate deref at :390. Scope fence holds: internal/config diff vs parent a07bb399 is empty; panel leaf invariant intact (go list -deps ./internal/panel | grep internal/config → exit 1); changed files match the BRIEF's six exactly. The two pre-existing failures (internal/harness, internal/instruct z4ps) are outside this bead's packages and its diff.
